title: S.O. 2950 (E), dated 21/11/2014 - Appointment of Justice Shri Pratap Kumar Ray as Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal.
description: S.O. 2950 (E), dated 21/11/2014 - Appointment of Justice Shri Pratap Kumar Ray as Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal.

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II— [k.M 3 — mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2369] ubZ fnYyh] 'kqØokj] uoEcj 21] 2014@dk£rd 30] 1936 No. 2369] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 21, 2014/KARTIKA 30, 1936 MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 21st November, 2014 S.O. 2950(E):— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 6 and read with Section 7 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Justice Pratap Kumar Ray, former Judge of High Court of Kolkata as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from 24th September, 2014 for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty seven years, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 17(13)/2013-PL/NGT (pt.)] BISHWANATH SINHA, Jt.
